intent: Demonstrate that selecting an evaluation that did not pass violates the selection gate.
positive_scenarios: take select immediately from evaluated while passed is false
forbidden_scenarios: treat reaching evaluated as equivalent to passing
repair the mutant or weaken SelectionRequiresPass during evaluation
anti_vacuity_obligations: Selection is enabled in the initial state.
The selected state with passed false is reachable in exactly one transition.

change_control.rule: Changing intent, properties, source bytes, witness shape, or oracle requires a new suite version.
